description: You are a wind energy analyst evaluating the aerodynamic performance of the NREL 5MW reference wind turbine. Using the sample project file at /home/ga/Documents/sample_projects/, perform a steady-state BEM simulation in QBlade with a tip-speed-ratio (TSR) sweep from 1 to 15 to generate the turbine's power coefficient (Cp) curve. Export the Cp vs TSR simulation results to /home/ga/Documents/projects/nrel5mw_bem_results.txt. Create a text report at /home/ga/Documents/projects/nrel5mw_report.txt documenting the optimal TSR, the maximum Cp value, and a one-sentence interpretation of the result. You are logged in as user 'ga'.
